introSection: Crazy Cab Coaster is a steel indoor roller coaster located at Trans Studio Mini in Balikpapan, East Kalimantan, Indonesia. The roller coaster opened with the park on 19 February 2016.
fullText: Crazy Cab Coaster is a steel indoor roller coaster located at Trans Studio Mini in Balikpapan, East Kalimantan, Indonesia. The roller coaster opened with the park on 19 February 2016.
